qry:select.name: qry_FindLast
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql (' SELECT MAX (TCO01_EJECUCIONES.f_Inicio_ejec ) as f_Inicio_ejec
FROM TCO01_EJECUCIONES WHERE TCO01_EJECUCIONES.c_modulo_tco={#SOURCE:@modulo_tco} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_Result
qry_ResultDIM
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql (' SELECT TCO01_EJECUCIONES.c_ejecucion, TCO01_EJECUCIONES.c_estado FROM TCO01_EJECUCIONES WHERE TCO01_EJECUCIONES.c_modulo_tco=\'DIMENSIONES\' and TCO01_EJECUCIONES.c_ejecucion = {#doc_resultDIM:@c_ejecucion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_ResultALL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql (' SELECT TCO01_EJECUCIONES.c_ejecucion, TCO01_EJECUCIONES.c_estado FROM TCO01_EJECUCIONES WHERE TCO01_EJECUCIONES.c_modulo_tco=\'datosComunes\' and TCO01_EJECUCIONES.c_ejecucion = {#doc_resultALL:@c_ejecucion_D} ')/ROWS/ROW

doc:set-attribute.from-value: Antiguedad del personal

with member [Measures].[Antiguedad Promedio] as '[Measures].[Antiguedad]' select {[Measures].[Cantidad], [Measures].[Antiguedad Promedio]} ON COLUMNS, Hierarchize({[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]}) ON ROWS from [PERSONAL] where {( [Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}

select {[Measures].[Cantidad], [Measures].[Ingreso], [Measures].[Egreso]} ON COLUMNS, Hierarchize({[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]}) ON ROWS from [PERSONAL] where {([Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}
Altas y Egresos del personal

with set [Menores de 20] as '{([Edades].[Todos las Edades].[1] : [Edades].[Todos las Edades].[20])}' set [Entre 21 y 40] as '{([Edades].[Todos las Edades].[21] : [Edades].[Todos las Edades].[40])}' set [Entre 41 y 55] as '{([Edades].[Todos las Edades].[41] : [Edades].[Todos las Edades].[55])}' set [Mayores a 55] as '{([Edades].[Todos las Edades].[56] : [Edades].[Todos las Edades].[69])}' member [Measures].[Menores de 20] as 'sum([Menores de 20],[Measures].[Cantidad])' member [Measures].[Entre 21 y 40] as 'sum([Entre 21 y 40],[Measures].[Cantidad])' member [Measures].[Entre 41 y 55] as 'sum([Entre 41 y 55],[Measures].[Cantidad])' member [Measures].[Mayores a 55] as 'sum([Mayores a 55],[Measures].[Cantidad])' select {[Measures].[Cantidad],[Measures].[Menores de 20],[Measures].[Entre 21 y 40],[Measures].[Entre 41 y 55] ,[Measures].[Mayores a 55]} ON COLUMNS, {[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]} ON ROWS from [PERSONAL] where {([Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}
Legajos según rango de edades
Promedio de edades
select {[Measures].[Cantidad], [Measures].[Edad_Promedio]} ON COLUMNS, {[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]} ON ROWS from [PERSONAL] where {([Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}
Capacitacion del personal

with member [Measures].[Personas] as 'Count(Filter({[Personal].[Todo el personal].Children}, ([Measures].[Horas Capacitacion] > 0.0)))' member [Measures].[Indice] as '([Measures].[Horas Capacitacion] / [Measures].[Personas])' member [Measures].[Horas] as '([Measures].[Horas Capacitacion])' select NON EMPTY {[Measures].[Horas],[Measures].[Personas], [Measures].[Indice]} ON COLUMNS, NON EMPTY Hierarchize(Union({[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]} , [Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO].Children)) ON ROWS from [PERSONAL] where [Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2]

with set [Cantidad Mayor 60] as '{([Edades].[Todos las Edades].[61] : [Edades].[Todos las Edades].[69])}' set [Cantidad Mayor 55] as '{([Edades].[Todos las Edades].[56] : [Edades].[Todos las Edades].[69])}' member [Measures].[Cantidad Mayor 60] as 'Sum([Cantidad Mayor 60], [Measures].[Cantidad])' member [Measures].[Cantidad Mayor 55] as 'Sum([Cantidad Mayor 55], [Measures].[Cantidad])' member [Measures].[Porcentaje55] as '([Measures].[Cantidad Mayor 55] / [Measures].[Cantidad])', FORMAT_STRING = '#%' member [Measures].[Porcentaje60] as '([Measures].[Cantidad Mayor 60] / [Measures].[Cantidad])', FORMAT_STRING = '#%' member [Measures].[Total] as '([Measures].[Cantidad])' select NON EMPTY {[Measures].[Total], [Measures].[Cantidad Mayor 55],[Measures].[Porcentaje55], [Measures].[Cantidad Mayor 60],[Measures].[Porcentaje60]} ON COLUMNS, ({[Sexos].[Ambos Sexos].[FEMENINO], [Sexos].[Ambos Sexos].[MASCULINO]}) ON ROWS from [PERSONAL] where {([Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}
Legajos próximos a jubilarse

with member [Measures].[Puntaje] as '[Measures].[Result_eval]' member [Measures].[Maximo] as 'Max({[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO], [Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO].Children}, [Measures].[Puntaje])' member [Measures].[Minimo] as 'Min({[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO], [Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO].Children}, [Measures].[Puntaje])' select NON EMPTY {[Measures].[Cantidad], [Measures].[Puntaje], [Measures].[Minimo], [Measures].[Maximo]} ON COLUMNS, NON EMPTY Hierarchize(Union({([Evento].[Todos los Eventos], [Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO])}, Crossjoin([Evento].[Todos los Eventos].Children, {[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]}))) ON ROWS from [EVALUACION] where {([Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}
Análisis de resultado de Evaluaciones

with member [Measures].[Valor] as '[Measures].[Result_comp]' member [Measures].[Maximo] as 'Max({[Competencia].CurrentMember, [Competencia].Children}, [Measures].[Valor])' member [Measures].[Minimo] as 'Min({[Competencia].CurrentMember, [Competencia].Children}, [Measures].[Valor])' select NON EMPTY {[Measures].[Cantidad], [Measures].[Valor], [Measures].[Minimo], [Measures].[Maximo]} ON COLUMNS, NON EMPTY Crossjoin({[Evento].[Todos los Eventos]}, {([Competencia].[Todos las Competencias], [Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO])}) ON ROWS from [EVALUACION] where {([Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}
Análisis de resultado de Competencias

with member [Measures].[Acumulado al 01/2009] as 'Sum({([Tiempo].[Todas las fechas].[2009].[01/2009] : [Tiempo].[Todas las fechas].[2009].[01/2009])}, [Measures].[TotPagado])' member [Measures].[Total 2009] as '[Measures].[TotPagado]' select {[Measures].[Total 2009] ,[Measures].[Acumulado al 01/2009] } ON COLUMNS , NON EMPTY Hierarchize(Union([Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO].Children, [Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO].Children )) ON ROWS from [SUELDOS]
Sueldos promedios Netos Acumulados

with member [Measures].[Minimo] as 'Min([Personal].Children, [Measures].[TotPagado])' member [Measures].[Maximo] as 'Max([Personal].Children, [Measures].[TotPagado])' member [Measures].[Total] as 'Sum([Personal].Children, [Measures].[TotPagado])' member [Measures].[Promedio] as '([Measures].[Total] / [Measures].[CantPers])' member [Measures].[%] as '([Measures].[CantPers] / ([Measures].[CantPers], [Organigrama].[Todo los Organigramas].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]))', FORMAT_STRING = '##0.##%' select {[Measures].[Minimo], [Measures].[Maximo], [Measures].[CantPers], [Measures].[Total], [Measures].[Promedio], [Measures].[%]} ON COLUMNS, {[Organigrama].[Todo los Organigramas].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]} ON ROWS from [SUELDOS] where [Tiempo].[Todas las fechas].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2]
Sueldos promedios Netos

with member [Measures].[Total Costos] as 'Sum({[Measures].[TotContribucion], [Measures].[TotSujetoReten], [Measures].[TotNoSujetoReten]})' member [Measures].[TotalGral] as 'Sum({[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]}, [Measures].[Total Costos])' member [Measures].[Sueldo Bruto] as 'Sum({[Measures].[TotSujetoReten], [Measures].[TotNoSujetoReten]})' member [Measures].[Contribuciones] as '[Measures].[TotContribucion]' member [Measures].[Di] as '([Measures].[TotalGral] - [Measures].[Presupuesto])' member [Measures].[Dif] as '([Measures].[Di])', FORMAT_STRING = '####0.00' member [Measures].[Variacion] as '([Measures].[Dif] / [Measures].[Presupuesto])', FORMAT_STRING =IIf(([Measures].[Di] < 0.0), '|00.0#%|style=green', IIf(([Measures].[Di] = 0.0), '00.0#%', IIf(([Measures].[Di] < 290.0), '|00.0#%|style=yellow', '|00.0#%|style=red'))) select NON EMPTY {[Measures].[Total Costos], [Measures].[Presupuesto], [Measures].[Dif], [Measures].[Variacion]} ON COLUMNS, NON EMPTY Hierarchize(Union({[Centros de Costo].[Todos los CC]}, [Centros de Costo].[Todos los CC].Children)) ON ROWS from [SUELDOS] where {([Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}
Análisis de variación de costo laboral

with member [Measures].[Total Costos] as 'Sum({[Measures].[TotContribucion], [Measures].[TotSujetoReten], [Measures].[TotNoSujetoReten]})' member [Measures].[TotalGral] as 'Sum({[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]}, [Measures].[Total Costos])' member [Measures].[Sueldo Bruto] as 'Sum({[Measures].[TotSujetoReten], [Measures].[TotNoSujetoReten]})' member [Measures].[Contribuciones] as '[Measures].[TotContribucion]' member [Measures].[%] as '([Measures].[Total Costos] / [Measures].[TotalGral])', FORMAT_STRING = '#%' select NON EMPTY {[Measures].[Total Costos], [Measures].[%] , [Measures].[Sueldo Bruto], [Measures].[Contribuciones]} ON COLUMNS, NON EMPTY Hierarchize(Union([Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO].Children, [Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO].Children )) ON ROWS from [SUELDOS] where {([Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}
Costo Laboral

select {[Measures].[Cantidad], [Measures].[Valor]} ON COLUMNS, NON EMPTY {([Tipo Conceptos].[Todos los Tipos de Conceptos], [Conceptos].[Todos los Conceptos])} ON ROWS from [SUELDOS_CONC] where ([Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO], [Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])
Sueldos Conformados

select Hierarchize({[Grupos Tipos Horas].[Todos los Grupos Tipos Horas]}) ON COLUMNS, Order({([Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO] , [Measures].[Horas])}, ([Grupos Tipos Horas].[Todos los Grupos Tipos Horas].[Ausencias], [Measures].[Horas]), DESC) ON ROWS from [HORAS] where {([Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}
Horas - Grupo Tipo Horas

SELECT NON EMPTY Hierarchize({[Tipos Horas].[Todos los Tipos Horas]}) ON COLUMNS, NON EMPTY Crossjoin(Hierarchize({[Organigrama].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]}), {[Measures].[Horas]}) ON ROWS from [HORAS] where {([Tiempo].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2])}
Horas - Tipo Horas

with member [Measures].[Horas Esperadas] as '[Measures].[HorasEsperado]' member [Measures].[HorasAusen] as '([Measures].[HorasAusencia] / [Measures].[Horas Esperadas])' member [Measures].[%] as 'IIf(([Measures].[HorasAusencia] = 0.0), 0.0, [Measures].[HorasAusen])', FORMAT_STRING = '##0.##%' member [Measures].[Horas de Ausencia] as '[Measures].[HorasAusencia]' select NON EMPTY {[Measures].[Horas de Ausencia], [Measures].[Horas Esperadas], [Measures].[%]} ON COLUMNS, NON EMPTY {[Organigrama].[Todo los Organigramas], [Organigrama].[Todo los Organigramas].[ORG_REEMPLAZO]} ON ROWS from [PERSONAL] where [Tiempo].[Todas las fechas].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO1].[ANIOMES_REEMPLAZO2]
Horas - Indices de Ausentismo
